briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to Vote on 10 Outstanding Zoning and Development Bylaws
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on a series of proposed zoning amendments (changes to land-use rules) and development approvals covering residential, mixed-use, and rental projects across the city. These bylaws are still in progress and have not yet received final approval.
briefs.action_required: Monitor Burnaby Council meeting agendas if any of these developments are near your business location.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Zoning Amendment No. 33 (7201 11th Ave) — second and third reading scheduled
Burnaby Zoning Amendment No. 33 (3789 Royal Oak Ave, Forest Lawn) — second and third reading scheduled
Burnaby Zoning Amendment No. 36 (4900 Kingsway mixed-use) — third reading scheduled
